name: DeepSeek-R1
tagline: First-gen reasoning model reaching performance comparable to OpenAI o1 on math, code and reasoning; open weights.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek), released 2025-01-20 — part of the DeepSeek R1 line. First-gen reasoning model reaching performance comparable to OpenAI o1 on math, cod…
overview: DeepSeek-R1 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek R1 line. Released 2025-01-20. First-generation reasoning line built on the V3 backbone with large-scale reinforcement learning, exposing chain-of-thought; open-weight under MIT.
What's notable in this version: First-gen reasoning model reaching performance comparable to OpenAI o1 on math, code and reasoning; open weights.
